# Medium Cut Foam Pad

## Premium polishing pad for fine abrasive polishes

Foam Pad for use with medium cut abrasive polishes. Removes slight scratches, holograms, and surface imperfections in combination with Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. The unique foam formulation delivers perfect cut and generates shine.

Accessories

### Processing

- Rotary 
- Orbital 
- With Hand Polishing Applicator 

### Volumes

| 95mm/ 3,5"

| 26908.099.001

| 150mm/ 6"

| 26900.224.011

| 180mm/ 7"

| 26902.099.001

Benefits

- Tailored to Menzerna Medium Cut polishes 
- Polishing pad is washable 
- Durable, long-lasting foam (approx. 20 vehicles can be polished) 

- Safety edge

- Straightforward application

FAQ

## Questions & answers

Do you have a question? We have the answer. On our FAQ page you will find frequently asked questions with the corresponding answers.

[To the FAQs](/car-care/training-tips/faqs)

[What kind of polishing pads are available?](javascript:;)

Polishing pads are generally divided into foam pads, microfiber pads, and lambswool polishing pads. Menzerna offers foam polishing pads in various degrees of hardness as well as a variety of lambswool pads for orbital and rotary polishing machines. Polishing pads come in different sizes.

[Here you will find an overview of our polishing pads.](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories)

[How much polish should be applied to the polishing pad?](javascript:;)

Recommendation for Menzerna polishes and a surface measuring 40 cm × 40 cm:

- Pad with a diameter of 95 mm: 3 to 4 pea-sized drops 
- Pad with a diameter of 150 mm: 5 pea-sized drops 
- Pad with a diameter of 180 mm: 6 to 7 pea-sized drops 

[How many cars can I polish with the Menzerna pads?](javascript:;)

Approximately 20 cars can be polished with Menzerna’s premium pads. However, the polishing pads need to be thoroughly cleaned. The Menzerna Premium Pads are available in different sizes:
- [Heavy Cut Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/heavy-cut-foam-pad)
- [Medium Cut Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/medium-cut-foam-pad)
- [Soft Cut Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/soft-cut-foam-pad)
- [Wax Foam Pad](/car-care/accessories/polishing-accessories/details/wax-foam-pad)

[Which pads should I use for Menzerna polishes?](javascript:;)

Menzerna’s premium pads are color-coordinated with the polish labels. The recommended polishing accessories can be found on each product’s detail page on our website. Product overview.

[What are the options for cleaning a polishing pad?](javascript:;)

Foam polishing pads can be washed by hand with clear water. Alternatively, a bucket may also be used. Please note: Lambswool polishing pads should never be rinsed with water. Instead, they should be cleaned with a lambswool brush or an air blow gun.

Always up to date

## Register for the newsletter now!

Subscribe now to the free Menzerna Newsletter and receive interesting tips and information about polishing.

[To the newsletter](/service/newsletter)

## Medium Cut Foam Pad

Outstanding foam polishing pad for use with our fine abrasive polishes Perfectly tailored to Menzerna Medium Cut polishes. Supports the abrasive performance – and quickly and reliably removes scratches and signs of use from the car coat. This long-lasting polishing pad is suitable for rotary and orbital polishing machines alike.
